Notice Of And Motion For Order To Compel Plaintiff To Attend A Mental Examination
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JOSE MARTINEZ and YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA YELLOW CAB'S Motion For Order To Compel Plaintiff To Attend A Mental Examination IS Transferred to the discovery calendar to be heard on the same date at 9:00 am in Dept. 301. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Defendants Jose Martinez And Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc. Dba Yellow Cab'S Motion For Order To Compel Plaintiff To Attend A Mental Examination
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel Balich, Esq. of Kern Noda Devine & Segal, Tel. 415.474.1900, for defendants and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The party stipulated to the Pro Tem Judge. The tentative ruling was adopted. DEFENDANTS JOSE MARTINEZ and YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA YELLOW CAB'S Motion For Order To Compel Plaintiff To Attend A Mental Examination is Granted per stipulation of the parties dated 12/4/13. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
